meta.title: Frequently Asked Questions | aws overseas
meta.description: Find answers to common questions about international shipping, freight forwarding, customs clearance, shipment tracking, payments, and shipping services.

hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.subtitle: Find quick answers to the most common questions about product sourcing, supplier verification, and international shipping.

categories.title: Browse FAQ Categories
categories.description: Select a category to quickly find the answers you're looking for.

items.question: What services does aws overseas provide?
items.answer: We source and verify manufacturers in India, inspect goods before dispatch, and manage Air Freight, Sea Freight, Import Services, Export Services, Customs Clearance, Warehousing, FCL, LCL, and Door-to-Door delivery.

items.question: How does aws overseas find and verify suppliers?
items.answer: We shortlist manufacturers matched to your specifications, then run on-ground checks to confirm their capacity, compliance, and production standards before you commit to an order.

items.question: Do you inspect products before they ship?
items.answer: Yes. Every order goes through pre-shipment quality inspection against your specification, so defects and mismatches are caught before goods leave the factory.

items.question: Which countries do you ship to?
items.answer: We provide international shipping solutions across multiple countries through our global shipping network.

items.question: When should I choose Air Freight?
items.answer: Air Freight is ideal for urgent, lightweight, or high-value shipments requiring faster delivery.

items.question: When should I choose Sea Freight?
items.answer: Sea Freight is the best option for heavy, oversized, or bulk cargo where cost efficiency is a priority.

items.question: Can aws overseas handle import and export documentation?
items.answer: Yes. Our team assists with documentation, customs procedures, and shipment coordination.

items.question: How can I track my shipment?
items.answer: You can enter your tracking number on our website or use the aws overseas Mobile App for real-time shipment updates and notifications.

items.question: Will I receive shipment updates?
items.answer: Yes. Customers receive notifications at every important stage of the shipment journey through the mobile app.

items.question: Which payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We support UPI, Credit Cards, Debit Cards, Net Banking, and Wallet Payments.

items.question: Can I download my invoice?
items.answer: Yes. Invoices are available for download after successful payment through the mobile application.

items.question: Do you provide customs clearance services?
items.answer: Yes. Our customs experts help ensure your shipment complies with import and export regulations.

items.question: Is the aws overseas Mobile App free?
items.answer: Yes. The application is completely free to download for Android and iOS devices.

items.question: What can I do with the mobile app?
items.answer: You can request quotes, book shipments, track cargo, upload documents, make payments, receive notifications, and manage your shipment history.

contactCTA.title: Still Have Questions?
contactCTA.description: Our shipping specialists are here to help you with your requirements. Contact us today for expert guidance and personalized support.
